output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?driver(((xsd:decimal(?pos15) + xsd:decimal(?pos16)) / 2) AS ?avg_pos) WHERE {
  ?driver p:P118 [ pq:P2868 wd:Q19704270 ; ps:P118 ?pos15 ] .
  ?driver p:P118 [ pq:P2868 wd:Q23045166 ; ps:P118 ?pos16 ] .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?avg_pos)
OFFSET 4
LIMIT 1
